summary: Comprehensive testing of Member 360 View upgrade. All backend APIs working correctly (14/14 tests passed). Frontend features fully functional: Static header with accumulators, Claims History with one-click EOB, Family/Dependents with cross-accumulation, Hour Bank tab preserved, Audit Trail tab preserved.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/members/{member_id}/accumulators returns individual_deductible with used/max
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/{member_id}/accumulators returns family_deductible with contributions array
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/{member_id}/accumulators returns oop_max with used/max
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/NONEXISTENT/accumulators returns 404
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/{member_id}/claims-history returns list of claims
✅ Backend: Claims history has required fields (id, claim_number, service_date, status, total_billed, total_paid)
✅ Backend: Claims history has cpt_codes as array
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/NONEXISTENT/claims-history returns 404
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/{member_id}/dependents returns subscriber object
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/{member_id}/dependents returns dependents array
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/{member_id}/dependents returns household_size
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/NONEXISTENT/dependents returns 404
✅ Backend: GET /api/claims/{claim_id} returns service_lines for EOB view
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/{member_id} returns header fields (member_id, first_name, last_name, status, dob, effective_date)
✅ Frontend: Member 360 dialog opens with static header showing name, status, member ID, DOB, effective date
✅ Frontend: Financial accumulator progress bars render for Individual Deductible ($91.78/$1,000 = 9%)
✅ Frontend: Financial accumulator progress bars render for Family Deductible ($91.78/$2,000 = 5%)
✅ Frontend: Financial accumulator progress bars render for Out-of-Pocket Max ($91.78/$5,000 = 2%)
✅ Frontend: Hour Bank status chip in top-right of header showing 66.0 hrs balance
✅ Frontend: Claims History tab shows full table with Claim #, Service Date, Provider, CPT Codes, Status, Source, Billed, Paid columns
✅ Frontend: One-click EOB: clicking claim row shows inline EOB detail with service lines, billed/paid/member_resp, adjudication notes
✅ Frontend: One-click EOB: 'Back to Claims' button returns to claims list
✅ Frontend: Family/Dependents tab shows subscriber card (green) with Subscriber badge
✅ Frontend: Family/Dependents tab shows 4 dependents with relationship badges
✅ Frontend: Family/Dependents tab shows household size (5)
✅ Frontend: Cross-accumulation section shows family deductible progress bar with each member's contribution
✅ Frontend: Hour Bank tab preserved with multi-tier data (Current: 66.0 hrs, Reserve: 0.0 hrs, Burn Rate: 120.0/mo, Months Left: 0.6)
✅ Frontend: Hour Bank tab has manual entry form with Hours input, Description, Add button
✅ Frontend: Hour Bank tab shows ledger with entries
✅ Frontend: Audit Trail tab preserved (shows 'No audit trail entries' for MBR001)
✅ Frontend: Static UI - header and accumulators remain stationary when switching tabs (no layout jitter)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing MBR001 (John Doe) with 7 claims and 4 household members.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Member 360 View fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Static header with name, status, member ID, DOB, effective date, 2) Financial accumulators (Individual Deductible, Family Deductible, OOP Max) with progress bars, 3) Hour Bank status chip in header showing balance and at-risk indicator, 4) Claims History tab with full table and one-click EOB inline view, 5) Family/Dependents tab with subscriber card, dependents list, household size, and cross-accumulation section, 6) Hour Bank tab preserved from iteration 13, 7) Audit Trail tab preserved. Test member MBR001 has 7 claims, 4 dependents, 66.0 hrs hour bank balance. Static UI verified - header/accumulators stay fixed while tabs switch.

static_ui.description: Header and accumulators remain stationary when switching tabs
